name: Slacking off in work - Chronoa
description:
Just went ahead and revisited Xenoverse 2 with sum mods, only to remember how bad Chronoa is, and FUCK I had to make a bot off her

Now I wanna get some stuff off my chest.

About my inactivity, I've been focusing on irl stuff as you've seen me appearing on bots less and less.

Before you go asking "Are you quitting" yes soon I am.

I'm obviously kidding lmao I'm not quitting anytime soon, also just because I don't comment on a bot doesn't mean I don't use it, i use alot of bots trust me, either to get freaky in that typa way or just make a silly and funny story

I got a few plans away, expect me to be semi active this week and the next

I'll probably make a suggestion bot soon, I haven't made one in a while, I wanna get to 400 followers this month, we're like.... So close dude.

Asl out...
creator: Asl437
